creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #3)
I was always frustrated with some of the hacks. For example, we have some effects that mangles the screen, but desktop is still recognizable. webcollage is not only deps-encumbered, but unsafe for work as it can fetch from the Net something wicked.

We can add an option - "Remove unsafe hacks" and just delete fancy stuff there. What do you think?
